summary: The VAT rate was changed from 19% to 20%, so the billing tests that assert 19% now fail.
root_cause_hypothesis: billing.ts sets VAT_RATE = 0.2; the tests expect 0.19 and the derived VAT/total amounts.
proposed_fix: Either revert VAT_RATE to 0.19 or update the tests to 20% — but the correct rate is a business decision.
